transcript: Prep skin with Tony Comfort. Pour toner onto a cotton pad and apply all over for smooth, hydrated and glowy skin. Apply a dropper full of Advanced Genifique Face Serum to the palm of your hands. Massage and press into skin with fingertips for a boost of radiance, hydration and anti-aging benefits. Moisturize with Renergy Lift Multi-Action Ultra Face Cream for a tightening, lifting and firming effect.
